items.desc: core Claude Code config: model, permissions, hooks, statusline, plugins (deep-merged)
per-machine permission allowlist (chmod/brew/ssh/scp/aws), templated per host
global Claude Code instructions: /graphify trigger + Matt Pocock agent-skills config pointers
rich statusline: context bar, sesh/dd/ww/mm/yy cost, tokens, cache %, git branch+dirty, clock — single-line marquee
ANSI-aware marquee renderer that scrolls the assembled statusline when it overflows the terminal width
stateful statusline helper: live token burn-rate/hr (rolling window + trend) and an evolving tamagotchi session pet (life stages + mood + energy)
today's Claude spend via ccusage (cached) for the statusline
this week's Claude spend (Mon-Sun, ccusage, cached) for the statusline
current-month Claude spend via ccusage (cached) for the statusline
year-to-date Claude spend via ccusage (cached) for the statusline
gruvbox-dark custom UI theme (matches statusline truecolor); selected via "theme":"custom:gruvbox-dark"
/output-style "Fable 5": Fable 5 persona system prompt; pair with the "Fable 5 Lite" /model entry (Opus 4.8 1M, registered via settings.json env)
/handoff: exhaustive segmented handoff doc when context runs low
/swarm — fan out a task across federated Claude leads
/shannon: autonomous white-box web & API pentester skill
agent-skills config: GitHub issue-tracker conventions for to-issues/triage/qa/to-prd
agent-skills config: canonical triage label vocabulary (needs-triage/needs-info/ready-for-agent/ready-for-human/wontfix)
agent-skills config: how engineering skills consume CONTEXT.md + docs/adr
head: routes a task to the right specialist(s) and synthesizes their output; default catch-all
accessibility: WCAG audits, semantic markup, keyboard/screen-reader and contrast fixes
data analyst: turns 'what does the data say about X' into queries, then interprets
API contract design: endpoints, OpenAPI, versioning, error models, pagination
system design: feature architecture, module boundaries, design-pattern choices
containers: Dockerfiles, compose, k8s manifests, image size/hardening
data pipelines: ETL/ELT, batch/stream flows, schema evolution, data quality
database design & optimization: schema, indexes, query plans, normalization
root-cause analysis on correctness bugs and test failures; diagnosis + minimal fix
dependency upkeep: upgrades, lockfile hygiene, CVE bumps, compatibility
reference docs: API references, READMEs, how-tos, doc-comments
short async comms: messages, DMs, status updates; text only
product/feature experiment design: hypotheses, prototype scope, metrics, iteration
UI/component implementation: layout, state, styling, accessible markup
git history surgery: rebase, bisect, conflict resolution, recovery
internationalization/localization: string extraction, plurals, RTL, formatting
general feature implementation from a spec or plan: writes, wires, tests
infrastructure-as-code: cloud provisioning, Terraform/Pulumi, networking, IAM
third-party integration: API/SDK wiring, webhooks, auth, retries/idempotency
schema/data/code migrations, codemods, backfills, version transitions
knowledge-base/notes upkeep: structure, frontmatter, indexes, link integrity
operations and deploys: CI/CD, env configs, hooks, secrets rotation
performance: profiling, bottlenecks, latency/throughput, memory/CPU/IO
product spec writer: user stories, acceptance criteria, feature scopes
LLM prompt/tool/eval design: prompts, tool schemas, eval harnesses
code restructuring: extract, rename, dedupe, split module, dead-code removal
release cuts: versioning, changelogs, tags, release notes, rollout
pulls up-to-date info: docs, API changes, version/best-practice checks; cites
code review for correctness, style, idiom, readability; structured findings
bulk intel harvester: pulls and normalizes content into referenced notes
meeting workflow: transcript to decisions, action items, filed + followups
in-depth security audit: code, deps/CVEs, infra, prompt-injection resistance
reliability: SLOs/SLIs, alerting, incident response, observability, runbooks
test & QA: test-plan design, coverage, TDD, scaffolding, flaky triage
personal CLI utilities and one-off dev-ergonomics scripts
issue triage: reproduce, classify, label, prioritize, route
type-system work: modeling, generics, narrowing, fixing type errors
longform prose: PRDs, RFCs, postmortems, design docs, blog posts
